Bantuan akan disalurkan dalam 7 hari bek: Assistance will be distributed within 7 working days from the date of approval.
Anda akan menerima e-mel rasmi berkenaan: You will receive an official email regarding the aid distribution method & schedule. Check your inbox regularly.

Maaf, ralat berlaku semasa memproses soa: Sorry, an error occurred while processing your question.

Explain the purpose of this campaign...
Kempen ini akan ditutup dan tidak lagi m: This campaign will be closed and will no longer accept new donations. Existing donation records remain saved.\n\nAre you sure?
Tugasan ini hanya akan dilihat oleh suka: This assignment will only be seen by selected volunteers

✅ Notifikasi berjaya diisytihar ke semua: ✅ Notification is successfully declared to all users.
Tiada kempen derma yang sepadan dengan c: No donation campaigns match your search.
Peratus wang yang diagihkan kepada setia: Percentage of money allocated to each category.
🔒 Pembayaran selamat. Resit layak potong: 🔒 Safe payment. Receipts are eligible for tax deduction.
★ Layak potongan cukai di bawah Subseksy: ★ Eligible for tax deduction under Subsection 44(6) of the Income Tax Act 1967.
E-mel ini telah didaftarkan. Sila guna e: This email has been registered. Please use another email.
Kumpul mata SIGAP untuk sijil: Collect SIGAP points for a certificate
Hai, saya AWANIS. AI Pembantu Bencana an: Hi, I'm AWANIS. Your Disaster Helper AI. What can I help you with today? You can ask me in Bahasa Malaysia or English.
Bagaimana nak kesan keselamatan keluarga: How do you want to affect the safety of my family?
Di mana pusat pemindahan (PPS) terdekat?: Where is the nearest transfer center (PPS)?
Boleh berikan amaran cuaca terkini?: Can you give the latest weather warning?
Kami mengumpul data seperti Nama, No. Ka: We collect data such as Name, No. Identification Card (IC), GPS Location Data, Telephone Number, and Bank Account Details (only for the purpose of Courtesy Claims).
Dengan menggunakan fungsi SOS dan Tuntut: By using the SOS and Claim functions in this application, you give us explicit consent to access your location and process your identification details.
Data akan disimpan secara selamat selagi: Data will be stored securely for as long as necessary to meet the purposes of official reporting and audits by the government. After that period, the data will be disposed of according to government procedures.
Nota: Pemberian maklumat palsu terutaman: Note: Providing false information especially for the purpose of Claims (BWI) is an offense and can be prosecuted under the Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission (MACC) Act 2009.
Sediakan kit kecemasan, kenal pasti pusa: Prepare an emergency kit, identify an evacuation center, and be aware of weather warnings.
Bagaimana mengetahui zon risiko?: How to know the risk zone?
Rujuk peta interaktif dalam aplikasi SIG: Refer to the interactive map in the SIGAP application or the NADMA portal.
Tekan butang SOS merah di skrin utama da: Press the red SOS button on the main screen and select the type of emergency. Your location will be sent to the rescuer.
Saya tiada internet, apa perlu buat?: I don't have internet, what should I do?
Gunakan Panduan Luar Talian di aplikasi: Use the Offline Guide in the SIGAP app. If you need help immediately, call 999.
Pergi ke tab Tuntutan (Claims) dan isika: Go to the Claims tab and fill out the form with a picture of proof.
Berapa lama proses kelulusan?: How long does the approval process take?
Biasanya mengambil masa 7-14 hari bekerj: It usually takes 7-14 working days depending on the confirmation of the government representative.
Anda akan menerima mata setelah berjaya: You will receive points after successfully completing the received SOS mission.
Ya, mata boleh ditebus untuk sijil pengh: Yes, points can be redeemed for a certificate of appreciation from NADMA/Bomba on the Leaderboard screen.
loginSubtitle: Welcome back. Please log in to continue.
registerSubtitle: Register as part of the SIGAP community.
forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we will send a link to reset your password.
resetEmailSent: Reset email has been sent. Please check your inbox.
chooseRoleSubtitle: Select the role that suits you to continue.
citizenDesc: Get help during emergencies, send SOS and track safety status.
volunteerDesc: Join relief operations, accept missions and collect SIGAP points.
officerDesc: Manage resources, monitor SOS clusters and coordinate disaster response.
errWeakPassword: Password too weak. Use at least 8 characters.
errTooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errNetworkFailed: No internet connection. Please try again.
pdfAwanisReportFooter: This report is generated by AWANIS (SIGAP AI System)
taxExemptionDesc:
This donation is eligible for tax exemption under
Subsection 44(6) of the Income Tax Act 1967.
receiptFooter:
Thank you for your support!
